_doc: Dogfood probes registry for v0.6.0-autonomy-chain retrospective spec. Each probe maps 1:1 with an acceptance_eval; gap_status reads .auto_probes_state.json + verify_report.md for verdicts.

probes.description: test_env.example.json validates against test_env.schema.json (required url; optional creds_ref + process_manager + auto_start_if_dead + schema_version).
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestMigrateProbesV2 — v1->v2 migrate idempotent, dry-run no-write, missing file handled.
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestAdditionalEvidence — pattern hit on tool_result, counts_as not in required_tools is skipped.
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestMcpCallCli — bad JSON args returns rc=2, unknown server returns rc=2.
tests/test_hooks_runtime_smoke.py::TestAutoRunProbes — hook exits 0 on irrelevant edit, no-op when auto_run=false, skips tests dir.
tests/test_hooks_runtime_smoke.py::TestAutoTestRunner — no-op when no mapping matches, skips tests dir.
tests/test_hooks_runtime_smoke.py::TestDaemonManager — no-op when test_env missing, no-op on v1 schema, skips test edits.
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestCredsResolver — env-file parsing (quoted strings, comments, blank lines), missing file returns empty dict.
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestGapStatus — within-predicate, failing, unknown classification; markdown render contains table header.
tests/test_diagnose_strategies.py — 3 strategies match expected error pattern, propose scoped patch, skip when no context.
tests/test_new_tools.py::TestRecipeToProbeScript — pattern match preserves text order, template variable substitution from named groups.
tests/test_debug_sentry_split.py — STRONG matches Traceback/qualified exceptions; WEAK requires context window; bare ValueError in source NOT matched.
